title: capsella curvisiliqua
intro: Capsella curvisiliqua, also known as heart-flowered shepherds' cress or heart-flowered cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Capsella curvisiliqua include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. Capsella curvisiliqua can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate digestive discomfort.
